CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-24-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Von Esch, Esq. 714-459-9118 of Von Esch Law Group ALC for Defendant DALLASWHITE CORPORATION through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DALLASWHITE CORPORATION's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment.

Defendant Dallaswhite Corporation's motion to vacate default and default judgment is GRANTED. There is a liberal policy to hear cases on the merits and defendant demonstrates good cause for relief. The motion was filed within 6 months of the entry of the default, defendant diligently moved for relief and provides a proposed answer, and defendant demonstrates mistake, inadvertence, and excusable neglect. (See CCP 473; Whiteway Dec.)

Counsel for Dallaswhite is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
